title: Untamed Earthy Canadian Anchovy Pasta
description: A springy Canadian dish featuring anchovy fillet in a mother-sauce-base, served in a mason jar, jain-friendly and perfect for meal prep. This earthy pasta is a delicious and healthy option for a quick lunch.

ingredients.name: anchovy fillets
ingredients.notes: packed in oil, drained and rinsed

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and chopped spring onions to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the vegetable broth, tomato paste, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the sauce for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the anchovy fillets and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Drain the cooked spaghetti and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the sauce.
Divide the pasta mixture among 4 mason jars and serve hot.
Let the jars cool to room temperature, then refrigerate or freeze for later use.
Reheat the pasta in the microwave or on the stovetop when ready to eat.
